purpose: Collect candidate public signals and create local review notes
identity_auth: Runs locally under operator account; no external account write access
secrets_boundary: Do not read, request, print, store, or infer secrets/tokens/credentials.
audit_log: Every run writes a dated local review packet with sources inspected and non-actions.
rollback_owner: Human operator deletes or reverts local artifacts if a packet is wrong.
human_approval_point: Required before public posting, GitHub publication, account actions, paid tools, or outreach.
notes: Example receipt for review-only research automation.
